name: Requirement Contradiction Gate
description: Directly contradictory requirements block all progression until the human resolves the contradiction. The agent must not resolve contradictions itself, must not choose one requirement over another, and must not average or merge conflicting requirements. Both conflicting requirements must be named explicitly.

trigger.condition: two or more requirements make mutually exclusive statements about the same system property
trigger.rationale: An unresolved contradiction means the system's intended behaviour is undefined. No valid SPEC can be written until the contradiction is resolved.

pass_conditions: No directly contradictory requirement pairs exist in requirements[]
fail_conditions: Requirement A states X for property P AND Requirement B states NOT-X for the same property P
Multiple contradictions: all must be reported before blocking

context_schema.contradictions: array<{req_a, req_b, property, description}> — agent-identified contradiction pairs

contradiction_patterns: encrypted at rest vs. stored in plaintext
resolution_required: Human explicitly confirms which requirement takes precedence
Artifact updated to reflect the resolution — the superseded requirement must be removed or amended
Resolution recorded as a human audit event
agent_must_not: Choose one requirement over another without human input
Merge contradictory requirements into a single requirement
Assume the later requirement supersedes the earlier one
Block on only a subset of contradictions when multiple exist

contradictions.description: REQ-001 requires permanent storage; REQ-003 requires deletion after 30 days
